violations.text: Prep unit #1 was observed holding an ambient temperature of 54 DF and in poor repair. No food was being stored in unit and prep unit replacement has already been ordered. Equipment must be in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 03/13/2025

Prep unit was observed held at 45 degrees Fahrenheit. Food items in unit were observed held at 45 DF. Time/temperature control for safety (TCS) food must be held at 41 degrees Fahrenheit or below except during preparation, cooking, or cooling. Per PIC, food items were stocked in prep unit 2 hours prior to inspection. Food items were moved to blast chiller to cool at the time of inspection. Establishment is not to store any TCS food in the bottom of the prep unit until it is able to hold an ambient temperature of 41 DF or less. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 02/27/2025

The presence of rodents is not controlled as evidenced by droppings. The presence of insects, rodents, and other pests must be controlled by routinely inspecting the premises for evidence of pests, using acceptable methods to control pests, eliminating harborage conditions, and routinely inspecting incoming shipments of food and supplies. Establishment is to clean any and all droppings in the storage room and under equipment in the kitchen using appropriate methods to clean and sanitize to monitor new activity. Establishment is to continue to work with pest control as frequently as needed and have a pest control report for the next inspection. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 02/27/2025
The gasket for prep unit #1 was observed in poor repair. Gaskets must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 03/03/2025

The following non-food contact surfaces have an accumulation of dust, dirt, food residue, and other debris. -Inside of prep units -2 door slider shelves -Walk-in fans Non-food contact surfaces must be cleaned to sight and touch. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 02/18/2025

Food contact surfaces of equipment/utensils can opener were observed with an accumulation of food and debris. The food contact surfaces of equipment must be clean to sight and touch. Can opener was cleaned at the time of inspection. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 02/17/2025

Various foods were observed held between 43-49 degrees Fahrenheit. Time/temperature control for safety (TCS) food must be held at 41 degrees Fahrenheit or below except during preparation, cooking, or cooling. Per PIC, prep unit was stocked from the walk-in cooler 2.5 hours prior to inspection. All food items were moved to the walk-in cooler or put in the blast chiller at the time of inspection. Establishment is not to store any TCS food items in prep unit #1, unit it can hold an ambient temperature of 41 DF or less. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 02/17/2025

The presence of mice is not controlled as evidenced by droppings. The presence of insects, rodents, and other pests must be controlled by routinely inspecting the premises for evidence of pests, using acceptable methods to control pests, eliminating harborage conditions, and routinely inspecting incoming shipments of food and supplies. Establishment is to clean any and all droppings in the storage room and under equipment in the kitchen using appropriate methods to clean and sanitize to monitor new activity. Establishment is to increase pest control as frequently as needed and have a pest control report for the next inspection. New Violation. Correct By: 02/17/2025
Prep unit #1 gasket was observed in poor repair. Gaskets must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 03/03/2025

The cutting boards in the cook line are very scratched and scored. Cutting blocks and boards that are subject to scratching and scoring shall be resurfaced if they can no longer be effectively cleaned and sanitized, or discarded if they are not capable of being resurfaced. New Violation. Correct By: 03/03/2025

The following non-food contact surfaces have an accumulation of dust, dirt, food residue, and other debris. -Inside of prep units -2 door slider shelves -Walk-in fans Non-food contact surfaces must be cleaned to sight and touch. New Violation. Correct By: 02/18/2025

The floors throughout the facility have an accumulation of soil residue and/or food debris. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. New Violation. Correct By: 02/21/2025
The hand-washing sink at the bar was blocked by strainer. A hand-washing sink shall be accessible at all times for employee use. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 01/31/2024

Chemicals (bug killer) was stored over the 3 bay sink. Chemicals must be stored to prevent the contamination of clean equipment, utensils linens, and/or single service by spacing or partitioning and locating them in an area that is not above food, equipment utensils, linens, and single service articles. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 01/31/2024

The presence of pests is not controlled as evidenced by droppings. The presence of insects, rodents, and other pests must be controlled by routinely inspecting the premises for evidence of pests, using acceptable methods to control pests, eliminating harborage conditions, and routinely inspecting incoming shipments of food and supplies. Corrective Action - Establishment is to thoroughly clean under all equipment, and all floor to eliminate the presence of droppings. Establishment is to continue weekly pest control. New Violation. Correct By: 02/28/2024
Refrigerator door gaskets were observed in poor repair on prep unit 2. Gaskets must be maintained in good condition. New Violation. Correct By: 02/28/2024
